notes: Owner chose to continue the money/financial-fraud direction after FTX (Ep.4) and explicitly delegated the topic choice for Ep.5 to Claude ('金融系で行こう。次の題材を決めて欲しい' then '任せる。すべて任せる', 2026-06-19). Claude recommended the Bernie Madoff Ponzi scheme over Theranos/Enron because Madoff is deceased (lower defamation risk than the living-defendant FTX), the Ponzi mechanism fits the channel's 'hidden system' angle, and it differentiates cleanly from FTX (paper Ponzi vs. crypto-exchange backdoor). Topic/portfolio gate satisfied by explicit owner direction + delegation (not inferred from tone). Proceed to research.
conditions: Visual identity stays symbolic; no real-person likeness (invariant 11).
